hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储理事米歇尔·鲍曼警告不要因通胀飙升而加息；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗贸易袭击以及以色列威胁贝鲁特，停火动摇；【CRYPTO】实时市场：Strategy 四年来首次抛售比特币，比特币跌破 72,000 美元。

items.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
items.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米歇尔·鲍曼警告不要因通胀飙升而加息
items.summary_zh: 鲍曼表示，对主要由能源价格和关税推动的通胀飙升做出反应已被证明是无效的。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Cease-Fire Wavers as U.S. and Iran Trade Attacks and Israel Threatens Beirut
items.summary: Israel issued an evacuation order for the suburbs of Lebanon’s capital. Oil prices spiked after an unconfirmed report that Iran would stop participating in peace talks.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗贸易袭击以及以色列威胁贝鲁特，停火动摇
items.summary_zh: 以色列向黎巴嫩首都郊区发出疏散令。在未经证实的报道称伊朗将停止参加和谈后，油价飙升。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin retreats under $72,000 as Strategy unloads BTC for first time in four years
items.summary: Crypto markets continue to struggle even as risk markets across the globe surge higher.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：Strategy 四年来首次抛售比特币，比特币跌破 72,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 尽管全球风险市场飙升，但加密货币市场仍在苦苦挣扎。

items.title: Bitcoin weakens near $72K as ETF outflows, stalled whale buying and macro uncertainty weigh on prices: analysts
items.summary: Bitcoin fell toward $72,000 as U.S. spot ETFs posted weekly outflows again amid Iran risk-off and weak whale demand.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，由于 ETF 流出、鲸鱼购买停滞和宏观不确定性打压价格，比特币价格下跌至 7.2 万美元附近
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗避险情绪和鲸鱼需求疲软，美国现货 ETF 每周再次出现资金流出，比特币跌至 72,000 美元。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway buys Taylor Morrison for $6.8 billion. Buffett touts Abel’s deal-making
items.summary: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司以 68 亿美元收购泰勒·莫里森。巴菲特吹捧阿贝尔的交易
items.summary_zh: 此次收购是沃伦·巴菲特的继任者格雷格·阿贝尔 (Greg Abel) 领导下的首批重大战略交易之一，格雷格·阿贝尔于 2026 年初接任首席执行官。

items.title: How Lebanon’s Best Chance to Disarm Hezbollah Failed
items.summary: Lebanon’s government has long wanted the powerful militia to give up its weapons. Before the Iran war began, there were signs of progress toward that goal.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩解除真主党武装的最佳机会为何失败
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩政府长期以来一直希望强大的民兵放弃武器。在伊朗战争开始之前，就有迹象表明这一目标已取得进展。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) surges 14.1% over weekend
items.summary: Binance Coin (BNB), up 7.9%, was also a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Stellar (XLM) 周末飙升 14.1%
items.summary_zh: 币安币 (BNB) 上涨 7.9%，也是表现最好的。

items.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy sold 32 bitcoin for $2.5 million to fund dividend payments
items.summary: The 8-K filing Monday says proceeds from the May 26-31 sale, executed at an average price of $77,135 a coin, will fund distributions on Strategy's preferred stock.
items.title_zh: Michael Saylor 的策略以 250 万美元的价格出售了 32 个比特币，用于支付股息
items.summary_zh: 8-K 周一提交的文件称，5 月 26 日至 31 日的销售（平均价格为每枚代币 77,135 美元）的收益将用于分配 Strategy 的优先股。

items.title: Bitcoin remains under pressure as ETF outflows, higher oil prices weigh on crypto markets
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 1, 2026
items.title_zh: 由于 ETF 资金流出、油价上涨对加密货币市场造成压力，比特币仍面临压力
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 1 日天气预报

items.title: Strategy holds STRC dividend at 11.5% for fourth straight month
items.summary: The preferred stock remains near its $100 par value as the company balances yield stability, ATM issuance capacity, and its bitcoin acquisition strategy.
items.title_zh: Strategy连续第四个月维持STRC股息为11.5%
items.summary_zh: 由于公司平衡了收益率稳定性、ATM 发行能力和比特币收购策略，优先股仍保持在 100 美元面值附近。

items.title: Bitcoin and software stocks are breaking up — and history says a major crypto move is coming
items.summary: Bitcoin and software equities have sharply diverged after moving in lockstep for years, raising questions over whether bitcoin will eventually catch up.
items.title_zh: 比特币和软件股正在崩溃——历史表明加密货币的重大举措即将到来
items.summary_zh: 比特币和软件股票在多年来步调一致后出现了大幅分化，引发了人们对比特币最终是否会迎头赶上的疑问。

items.title: Dogecoin gains access to Paxos network used by PayPal and Venmo
items.summary: House of Doge struck partnership with Paxos to integrate DOGE across the firm's enterprise-grade brokerage and custody infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 狗狗币获得 PayPal 和 Venmo 使用的 Paxos 网络的访问权限
items.summary_zh: House of Doge 与 Paxos 建立合作伙伴关系，将 DOGE 整合到该公司的企业级经纪和托管基础设施中。

items.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy sells 32 bitcoin for $2.5 million as total holdings drop to 843,706 BTC
items.summary: Strategy's remaining holdings still account for more than 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $61 billion.
items.title_zh: Michael Saylor 的策略以 250 万美元出售 32 个比特币，总持有量降至 843,706 个比特币
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的剩余持有量仍占 2100 万比特币供应上限的 4% 以上，价值约 610 亿美元。

items.title: Binance adds over 7,000 US stocks and ETFs for traders outside the United States amid super app push
items.summary: Binance launched U.S. stock and ETF trading for non-U.S. users and has plans for tokenized equities on BNB Chain.
items.title_zh: 币安在超级应用程序推送中为美国以外的交易者增加了 7,000 多只美国股票和 ETF
items.summary_zh: 币安为非美国用户推出了美国股票和 ETF 交易，并计划在 BNB 链上进行代币化股票。

items.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
items.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.
items.title_zh: Warp 押注于使用 GPT-5.5 构建开源
items.summary_zh: Warp 使用 GPT-5.5 和 OpenAI 模型来协调本地、云和开源开发工作流程中的编码代理。

items.title: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
items.summary: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.
items.title_zh: 两个月，26 亿美元：NASA ETF 如何将 SpaceX IPO 变成热门零售交易
items.summary_zh: 随着埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的临近，散户投资者纷纷涌入太空主题 ETF，其中包括 NASA，后者提供直接投资这家火箭公司的机会。

items.title: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show
items.summary: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.
items.title_zh: 卫星图像显示，自战争开始以来，伊朗袭击损坏了 20 个美国军事基地
items.summary_zh: 分析人士告诉 BBC verify，德黑兰的袭击范围比公开承认的还要广泛。

items.title: Huge blast kills dozens in rebel-held village in Myanmar
items.summary: Insurgents say it was caused by explosives being used for mining close to the Chinese border.
items.title_zh: 缅甸叛军控制的村庄发生巨大爆炸，造成数十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 叛乱分子称，这是由于在中国边境附近采矿时使用爆炸物造成的。

items.title: Nigeria police warn against reprisal attacks against South Africans
items.summary: Tensions have been rising in South Africa in recent weeks following several anti-migrant protests.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚警方警告不要对南非人进行报复性袭击
items.summary_zh: 最近几周，在发生几起反移民抗议活动后，南非的紧张局势不断升级。

items.title: Syrian Officers Who Hid in Plain Sight Face War Crime Charges in Austria
items.summary: The trial, Austria’s first against Assad regime officials, will be a rare chance for Syrian witnesses to confront two men they have accused of torture.
items.title_zh: 隐藏在众目睽睽之下的叙利亚军官在奥地利面临战争罪指控
items.summary_zh: 这是奥地利首次针对阿萨德政权官员的审判，对于叙利亚证人来说，这将是一次难得的机会，可以与他们指控施行酷刑的两名男子对峙。

items.title: Dozens Killed as Explosion Flattens Rebel-Held Village in Myanmar
items.summary: The local authorities said the cause was an accident at a warehouse that held explosives for mining operations.
items.title_zh: 缅甸叛军控制的村庄发生爆炸，造成数十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 地方当局表示，事故原因是一个存放采矿作业炸药的仓库发生事故。

items.title: Japan's ruling party supports crypto ETF trading, yen-based stablecoins
items.summary: Japan's ruling Liberal Democratic Party said the country should create a legal framework for trading crypto ETFs in a proposal to the finance minister.
items.title_zh: 日本执政党支持加密货币 ETF 交易和基于日元的稳定币
items.summary_zh: 日本执政党自民党在向财务大臣提交的提案中表示，该国应制定加密 ETF 交易的法律框架。

items.title: IREN lands $3.65 billion A-rated financing for Microsoft AI buildout
items.summary: The debt package helps IREN cover about 96% of the GPU spending needed to fulfill the Microsoft contract.
items.title_zh: IREN 为微软 AI 建设获得 36.5 亿美元 A 级融资
items.summary_zh: 该债务计划帮助 IREN 承担了履行微软合同所需的约 96% 的 GPU 支出。

items.title: Digital euro is key to counter stablecoin risks, says ECB’s Schnabel
items.summary: Isabel Schnabel, an ECB board member, said Monday that central banks should respond to stablecoin risks with strong regulation and CBDCs.
items.title_zh: 欧洲央行施纳贝尔表示，数字欧元是应对稳定币风险的关键
items.summary_zh: 欧洲央行董事会成员伊莎贝尔·施纳贝尔 (Isabel Schnabel) 周一表示，央行应通过强有力的监管和 CBDC 来应对稳定币风险。

items.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何利用 Codex 建立代理组织
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 Codex 构建代理组织、加速软件交付并将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时。

items.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
items.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
items.title_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程
items.summary_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 正在通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程，帮助思科扩展 AI 原生开发、加速 AI 防御工作并自动执行缺陷修复。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.

items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nvidia, Meta and Schlumberger rank among top companies adopting AI, new study says
items.summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down how well S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared to their peers.
items.title_zh: 新研究称，英伟达、Meta 和斯伦贝谢跻身采用人工智能的顶尖公司之列
items.summary_zh: 人工智能驱动企业研究所发布了一项新研究，详细分析了标准普尔 500 强公司与同行相比采用人工智能的情况。

items.title: Bitmine slows ether purchase pace, buying $53 million worth last week
items.summary: The Ethereum treasury firm cut weekly purchases by more than 75% after the previous week's 112,000 ETH buying spree.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 放慢了以太币购买速度，上周购买了价值 5300 万美元的以太币
items.summary_zh: 继上周疯狂购买 112,000 枚 ETH 后，这家以太坊财务公司将每周购买量削减了 75% 以上。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether start June in the red while futures show taste for risk. XLM, HYPE gain
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether fell Monday after dropping in May, a month that usually sees them post positive returns. U.S. equity index futures rose.
items.title_zh: 比特币、以太币六月开局就出现亏损，而期货则显示出对风险的偏好。 XLM、HYPE 增益
items.summary_zh: 比特币和以太币在五月份下跌后周一下跌，五月份通常会带来正回报。美国股指期货上涨。

items.title: Bitmine acquires 26,497 ETH as it targets a slower approach to 5% of Ethereum’s total supply
items.summary: Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said the company would reach its 5% acquisition target of Ethereum's total supply "sometime in 2026."
items.title_zh: Bitmine 收购了 26,497 ETH，目标是缓慢接近以太坊总供应量的 5%
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 董事长 Tom Lee 表示，该公司将在“2026 年的某个时候”实现以太坊总供应量 5% 的收购目标。

items.title: US-based funds drive $1.7B in global crypto ETP outflows as redemption streak extends to three weeks: CoinShares
items.summary: Global crypto ETP outflows hit $1.67 billion last week as Bitcoin products recorded their biggest weekly outflow of the year.
items.title_zh: 随着赎回周期延长至三周，美国基金推动全球加密货币 ETP 流出 1.7B 美元：CoinShares
items.summary_zh: 上周，全球加密货币 ETP 流出量达到 16.7 亿美元，比特币产品创下了今年最大的单周流出量。

items.title: Coinbase launches Indian rupee rails with perps access in expansion push
items.summary: The Nasdaq-listed company said it has established INR order books to provide dedicated liquidity for users in the country.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 推出印度卢比铁路，并在扩张推动中允许准入
items.summary_zh: 这家纳斯达克上市公司表示，已建立印度卢比订单簿，为该国用户提供专门的流动性。

items.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
items.summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
items.title_zh: 通过 Rosalind Biodefense 增强社会复原力
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind Biodefense，为经过审查的开发人员和美国政府合作伙伴扩大对 GPT-Rosalind 的可信访问，通过前沿 AI 推进生物防御、公共卫生和大流行病防范。

items.title: A shared playbook for trustworthy third party evaluations
items.summary: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.
items.title_zh: 值得信赖的第三方评估的共享手册
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 分享了第三方人工智能评估指南，涵盖如何评估前沿系统的模型能力、保障措施和有效性。

items.title: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
items.title_zh: 欢迎 NVIDIA Cosmos 3：首个用于物理 AI 推理和行动的开放式全模型

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
items.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.
items.title_zh: “要么颠覆，要么消亡”：人工智能正在摧毁 ChatGPT 之前建立的一代初创公司
items.summary_zh: 人工智能热潮为 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 注入了超过 2500 亿美元，这使得在 2022 年 ChatGPT 到来之前建立的数百家初创公司陷入困境。

items.title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
items.summary: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.
items.title_zh: 中国初创公司考虑首次公开募股，英伟达选择 Unitree 作为人形机器人平台
items.summary_zh: 这家美国芯片制造商的第一个公开的人形机器人系统将使用中国初创公司 Unitree 的人形机器人。

items.title: China’s factory activity beats forecasts in May, private survey shows, despite softer official data
items.summary: China’s manufacturing activity expanded faster than expected in May, according to a private survey released Monday, although growth slowed from April.
items.title_zh: 私人调查显示，尽管官方数据疲软，中国 5 月份工厂活动仍超出预期
items.summary_zh: 周一发布的一项私人调查显示，中国 5 月份制造业活动扩张速度快于预期，但增速较 4 月份有所放缓。

items.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
items.summary: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is scheduled to be interviewed about his relationship to the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in June.
items.title_zh: 巴克莱银行前首席执行官 Jes Staley 同意 7 月 23 日接受监督小组关于杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 的采访
items.summary_zh: 微软联合创始人比尔盖茨计划于六月接受采访，谈论他与性犯罪者杰弗里爱泼斯坦的关系。

items.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
items.summary: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 起诉罗德岛州针对预测市场的行为
items.summary_zh: 这是该委员会在谁有权监管赛事合约平台的争议中起诉的第七个州。

items.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
items.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."
items.title_zh: 博彩协会称各州因预测市场损失了 10 亿美元的税收
items.summary_zh: 美国博彩协会主席兼首席执行官比尔·米勒补充说，他认为预测市场平台相当于“后门体育博彩”。

items.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Iran targets American forces in Kuwait
items.summary: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.
items.title_zh: 美国称，伊朗瞄准驻科威特美军，袭击了伊朗雷达站
items.summary_zh: 伊朗和美国表示，他们在霍尔木兹海峡周围发动了新的袭击，科威特谴责伊朗“一再”发动袭击。

items.title: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates
items.summary: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.
items.title_zh: 随着真主党冲突升级，以色列总理下令对贝鲁特郊区发动袭击
items.summary_zh: 本杰明·内塔尼亚胡表示，针对以色列平民的袭击，真主党在达希赫的据点将成为攻击目标。

items.title: Five patients recover from Ebola in DR Congo and leave hospital
items.summary: Those infected can get better and officials stress that people should seek medical help if they have symptoms.
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国五名埃博拉患者康复并出院
items.summary_zh: 感染者可以好转，官员强调，如果出现症状，人们应该寻求医疗帮助。

items.title: France seized sanctioned Russian oil tanker with UK help, Macron says
items.summary: A British helicopter provided support during the operation on Sunday, the UK ministry of defence says.
items.title_zh: 马克龙表示，法国在英国的帮助下扣押了受制裁的俄罗斯油轮
items.summary_zh: 英国国防部表示，一架英国直升机在周日的行动中提供了支持。

items.title: Poland's controversial 'Highway to Hel' 666 bus revived
items.summary: Poland's seaside resort called Hel is getting its 666 bus service back, despite earlier opposition from Christian groups.
items.title_zh: 波兰备受争议的“通往赫尔的高速公路”666巴士复活
items.summary_zh: 波兰的海滨度假胜地海尔 (Hel) 不顾基督教团体的反对，正在恢复 666 路公交车服务。

items.title: Litterbugs now face on-the-spot fines in Tokyo's tourist hotspot
items.summary: Dozens of officials will patrol world-famous Shibuya as Japan responds to the impacts of overtourism.
items.title_zh: 东京旅游胜地乱扔垃圾将面临当场罚款
items.summary_zh: 随着日本应对过度旅游的影响，数十名官员将在世界著名的涩谷巡逻。

items.title: Voting suspended in parts of Ethiopia over security concerns
items.summary: Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed's party is expected to dominate the election as conflicts overshadow the vote.
items.title_zh: 出于安全考虑，埃塞俄比亚部分地区暂停投票
items.summary_zh: 由于冲突给投票带来了影响，预计总理阿比·艾哈迈德的政党将在选举中占据主导地位。

items.title: An Industrial Gem in Venezuela Now Embodies the Country’s Decay
items.summary: Cumaná was once an economic hub, producing Toyota Land Cruisers and exporting food across South America. Now it’s on the brink of disaster as public services collapse.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉的一颗工业宝石现在体现了该国的衰落
items.summary_zh: 库马纳曾经是一个经济中心，生产丰田陆地巡洋舰并向南美洲出口食品。现在，随着公共服务崩溃，它正处于灾难的边缘。

items.title: Andriy Yermak, Once the Muscle Behind Zelensky, Is Now Crowdfunding Bail Money
items.summary: Volodymyr Zelensky’s onetime right-hand man is accused of embezzling millions of dollars and consulting a fortuneteller on political decisions.
items.title_zh: 安德烈·叶尔马克（Andriy Yermak）曾经是泽伦斯基背后的支柱，现在正在众筹保释金
items.summary_zh: 弗拉基米尔·泽伦斯基曾经的得力助手被指控挪用数百万美元，并就政治决策咨询算命先生。

items.title: UK Releases More Files About Mandelson, Ex-Diplomat With Ties to Epstein
items.summary: Peter Mandelson, who was fired over his links to Jeffrey Epstein, made the claim in a letter that was revealed in more than a thousand pages of documents released on Monday.
items.title_zh: 英国公布了更多关于与爱泼斯坦有联系的前外交官曼德尔森的文件
items.summary_zh: 因与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦（Jeffrey Epstein）有联系而被解雇的彼得·曼德尔森（Peter Mandelson）在一封信中提出了这一说法，周一公布的一千多页文件中披露了这封信。

items.title: Ethiopia’s Election Comes at a Critical Moment for the Country: What to Know
items.summary: The vote comes at a critical moment for the country, which faces fears of renewed conflict in the Tigray region and tensions with Eritrea over access to the Red Sea.
items.title_zh: 埃塞俄比亚的选举正值该国的关键时刻：需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 这次投票是在该国的关键时刻进行的，该国面临着提格雷地区新一轮冲突以及与厄立特里亚因红海通道问题而紧张局势的担忧。

items.title: Brooklyn Rivera, Nicaraguan Indigenous Leader, Dies in Government Custody
items.summary: Brooklyn Rivera, 73, one of the most prominent Miskito political leaders in recent history, was arrested by the government in 2023. His family and other groups dispute the circumstances surrounding his death.
items.title_zh: 尼加拉瓜原住民领袖布鲁克林·里维拉在政府拘留中去世
items.summary_zh: 73 岁的布鲁克林·里维拉 (Brooklyn Rivera) 是近代历史上最著名的米斯基托政治领导人之一，于 2023 年被政府逮捕。他的家人和其他团体对他的死亡原因存在争议。

items.title: Taiwan Criticizes China’s Expulsion of New York Times Reporter
items.summary: The Taiwan president’s spokeswoman said China used “baseless pretexts” to punish journalists, which she called evidence that Beijing was a “troublemaker.”
items.title_zh: 台湾批评中国驱逐《纽约时报》记者
items.summary_zh: 台湾总统发言人表示，中国使用“毫无根据的借口”惩罚记者，她称这证明北京是“麻烦制造者”。

items.title: Cardano Summit 2026 canceled after community votes against Foundation funding proposal
items.summary: The Cardano Foundation's flagship conference was scrapped after a funding proposal failed to secure the two-thirds support required under the blockchain's new governance system.

items.summary_zh: 由于一项融资提案未能获得区块链新治理体系所需的三分之二支持，卡尔达诺基金会的旗舰会议被取消。

items.title: ‘Gnosis will cover all user losses’ amid exploit related to Gnosis Pay, co-founder Koppelmann says
items.summary: Gnosis co-founder Martin Koppelmann said all user losses will be covered as containment efforts continue following an exploit.
items.title_zh: 联合创始人 Koppelmann 表示，“Gnosis 将弥补与 Gnosis Pay 相关的漏洞造成的所有用户损失”
items.summary_zh: Gnosis 联合创始人 Martin Koppelmann 表示，随着漏洞利用后的围堵工作继续进行，所有用户损失都将得到补偿。

items.title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
items.summary: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.

items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam

items.title: Media Advisory: MIT to establish regional quantum hub
items.summary: With $25 million investment from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, MIT to build a new shared-use facility to serve as a statewide quantum toolbox.
items.title_zh: 媒体咨询：麻省理工学院将建立区域量子中心
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院获得马萨诸塞州联邦投资 2500 万美元，用于建造一个新的共享设施，作为全州范围内的量子工具箱。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育计划首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。
